subcodes.first_line: O servant! The days have passed, and thy letter hath not appeared before the Throne. It is as though thou hadst forgotten thy Lord and remained distant from the shore [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد قد قضت ایام و ماحضر تلقاء العرش کتابک کانک نسیت ربک و کنت عن شاطی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @chastisement and requital, @Manifestation of God as sun, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
